draftCopy: Flat roof replacement on a Tucson home—old decking out, new underlayment in, tile sections going back on. This is how we protect low-slope areas from our monsoons and summer heat. If your flat roof is showing its age, let's get you squared away before the next storm season.
finalCopy: Flat roof replacement on a Tucson home—old decking out, new underlayment in, tile sections going back on. This is how we protect low-slope areas from our monsoons and summer heat. If your flat roof is showing its age, let's get you squared away before the next storm season.

note: This is a roof replacement job in Oro Valley we completed today we replaced a tile roof and sealed all of the valleys
draftCopy: Our crew wrapped up a tile roof replacement in Oro Valley today. This flat roof section got fresh decking and sealed valleys before the tile goes back on. If your Tucson-area tile roof needs repair or replacement, we'd be happy to take a look.
